meaning: adj.规则的,有秩序的,经常的,(花)整齐的,常备军的,等边的,合格的,定期的n.正规军,正式队员adv.经常地n.正常体
examples: Regular exercise helps prevent weight gain.
Employees make regular donations to charity.
New video-processing chips, meanwhile, let agents merge images from infrared cameras with regular video.
Called MuTh, the theatre seats 400 and will host regular performances by the choir.
